title: How Alex Hormozi ACTUALLY Uses AI
summary: Austin Marchese breaks down Alex Hormozi's four-pillar AI system for running businesses: data as competitive advantage, voice-first design, workflow decomposition, and compound effects. The video also highlights a team mistake that required leadership intervention to correct.
